description_long: This is a triangular road work detour ahead sign with a white background and a bold red border, supported by a sturdy metal frame. The sign face features a black pictogram of a person digging, indicating ongoing roadwork or construction ahead. The frame consists of two vertical legs and a rear support bar, forming a stable, freestanding structure suitable for temporary placement. The materials appear to be primarily metal for the frame and a composite or metal panel for the sign face, ensuring durability and weather resistance. The sign is designed to be highly visible to drivers and pedestrians, with its bright colors and clear iconography. There are no visible text elements or arrows, and the sign is intended for roadside or shoulder placement in urban or suburban environments.
description: A triangular road work detour ahead sign with a red border, black digging pictogram, and metal frame for temporary roadside use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full triangular sign face with red border and black roadwork pictogram.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angled support frame and the thin profile of the sign panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the metal frame structure and support bars behind the sign face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the angled support and the edge of the sign panel.
